PROP-01b-partial1-inv-004.text: bid() callback executes attacker-controlled code with transferred assets before assetOut is pulled.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-004.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): data.length>0 => callback(bidder,assetOut,assetOutAmt,data) called after transfer

locations.note: IAuctionCallback.onBidCallback invoked when data.length > 0; executes after safeTransfer, before safeTransferFrom
callback interface — attacker implements this to execute arbitrary logic during bid window
